title: Around the Corner Bookshelf
summary: A modular bookshelf system that starts as a standalone unit and can be extended with a corner add-on panel — same trim and shelf language on both, wrapping continuously around a room corner.
description:
This bookshelf is designed to be built once as a standalone unit and extended later — the main bookshelf stands on its own, complete with its own top and shelves, but a matching side panel and shelf set can be added afterward to wrap the whole thing around a room corner. Build the main unit first exactly like any standalone bookshelf: attach 1x2 trim to the side panels, add legs, then top supports, then the trimmed shelf, then the top.

**The corner add-on reuses the main unit's side panel as its own shared wall** rather than building two full independent bookshelves side by side — its own third side panel, legs, and shelves all attach directly onto the completed main unit. This is what makes the two pieces read as one continuous wraparound shelf rather than two separate boxes pushed together in a corner.

A back panel is optional on both sections and goes on last, nailed and glued into place once every shelf and trim piece is set. If you only want the standalone version, stop after the main bookshelf steps — the corner add-on is a genuinely separate phase, not a required finishing step.

materials.name: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

steps.title: Build the main side panels and legs
steps.body: Attach 1x2 side trim pieces to the 1x12 side panels, drilling pocket holes along the front and back edges for attaching legs. Attach legs to the side panels with pocket hole screws.

steps.title: Add top supports and the middle shelf
steps.body: Attach top supports to the legs. Attach side trim to the middle shelf, then attach the whole trimmed shelf to the side panels.

steps.title: Attach the top
steps.body: Attach side trim to the top piece, then attach the top to the bookshelf base. The standalone main bookshelf is now complete.

steps.title: Build the corner add-on side panel
steps.body: Build the corner add-on's third side panel the same way as the main side panels, and attach it to the completed main bookshelf with pocket holes.

steps.title: Add the corner add-on shelves and top
steps.body: Add the middle shelf with 1x2 trim pre-attached, then the bottom shelf with 2x2 trim attached. Build and attach the corner add-on top.

steps.title: Attach the backs and finish
steps.body: Nail or staple the optional back panels on with glue. Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

images.alt: Modular bookshelf wrapping around a room corner
